scripts.test:packaged:mac: OD_PACKAGED_E2E_MAC=1 vitest run -c vitest.config.ts specs/mac.spec.ts --environment node --testTimeout 180000
scripts.test:ui: pnpm run clean && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:ui:headed: pnpm run clean && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts --headed
